response.original_title: Christmas Across America: A Musical Portrait of Christmas from Sea to Shining Sea
response.overview: Brand new VHS Video. Color and runs for 40 mins. Musical Selections include: Silent Night; We Wish You A Merry Christmas; Away In The Manger; Deck The Halls; It came Upon A Midnight Clear; Ode To Joy; God Rest Ye Merry Gentlemen; The First Noel; Hark! The Herald Angels Sing; Auld Lang Syne and many more.
response.title: Christmas Across America: A Musical Portrait of Christmas from Sea to Shining Sea
